question.text: Under Section 11(5) of the SEBI Act, amounts disgorged are credited to which fund?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Section 11(5) of the SEBI Act states that amounts disgorged pursuant to directions under section 11B shall be credited to the Investor Protection and Education Fund (IPEF) established by SEBI. **The Trap:** Candidates may confuse this with other funds like the Investor Education and Protection Fund (IEPF) under the Companies Act, 2013. **Cross-Exam Context:** The IPEF is referenced in multiple NISM certifications including Series VIII and Series V-A. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Disgorgement means forcing wrongdoers to give up ill-gotten gains, and these funds are channeled back for investor welfare.
